refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions for each phase allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under duty cycle and site conditions.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

candidate_dps: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency
DP2: Optimize vehicle propulsion and navigation systems for travel phase efficiency
DP3: Optimize vehicle dumping mechanism and control for dump phase efficiency
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address each sub-FR distinctly

potential_sources: Interdependence between travel and load phases timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by phase but require coordination via control logic to avoid timing conflicts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle subsystems can be optimized independently without adverse cross-phase effects
Risk of control system complexity increasing due to phase coordination
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit control coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical vehicle subsystems implementing load, travel, and dump phase optimizations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety alerts to Safety Services during cycle operations

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle contains all physical mechanisms and control for cycle phases; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution manages overall coordination but does not implement physical cycle optimizations.
Teleoperation involved in remote control but not direct cycle time optimization.
Safety Services only receives alerts, no containment of cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the primary owner of cycle time optimization DPs due to physical implementation scope.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for control coordination
Risk of diffusion if control logic is split across Vehicle and NGHE Solution
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify control logic ownership and interface boundaries between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; DPs logically address each sub-FR.

diffusion_risks: Control logic coordination may diffuse across Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Physical cycle time functions well contained in Vehicle; control coordination ownership needs clarification.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and tasking interfaces is feasible; physical testing of Vehicle subsystems supports validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of physical cycle time functions to Vehicle; control coordination allocation needs refinement.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit control coordination DP and assign to NGHE Solution or Vehicle to reduce diffusion risk.
Clarify interface contracts for control signals between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are mostly sound, control coordination diffusion risk requires revisiting DP and IM boundaries to improve architectural clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

revise.why: To explicitly define and allocate control coordination DP to reduce diffusion and clarify ownership.

assumptions: Vehicle subsystems can be optimized independently per cycle phase.
open_risks: Potential interface mismatches between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Detailed control logic design and interface definitions.
Verification plan for control coordination effectiveness.
